---
title: "Overview of care for head and neck Cancer cases in Brazilian Cancer Centers during the COVID-19 pandemic"
date: 2025-07-01
author:
  - name: Gonçalves, Sergio
  - name: Kulcsar, Marco Aurélio Vamondes
  - name: De Matos, Leandro Luongo
  - name: Guilherme Vartanian, José
  - name: De Carvalho, Genival Barbosa
  - name: Dias, Fernando Luiz
  - name: De Farias, Terence Pires
  - name: Neto, Emilio Tosto
  - name: Santos, Carlos Roberto Dos
  - name: Silva, Lucas Gomes
  - name: Javaroni, Afonso Do Carmo
  - name: Ramos, Gyl Henrique Albrecht
  - name: Cavalheiro, Beatriz Godoy
  - name: Carlos De Oliveira, José
  - name: De Cicco, Rafael
  - name: De Mello, Luiz Eduardo Barbalho
  - name: De Melo Junior, Bartolomeu Cavalcanti
  - name: Santos, Luiz Roberto Medina Dos
  - name: Goulart, Rafael Nunes
  - name: Kowalski, Luiz Paulo
abstract: > 
  Resumo não disponível.
categories: [article]
citation: 
  container-title: "Brazilian Journal of Otorhinolaryngology"
  volume: 91
  doi: "10.1016/j.bjorl.2025.101638"
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../index.html">Publicações</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">Overview of care for head and neck Cancer cases in Brazilian Cancer Centers during the COVID-19 pandemic</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
